source_levels.label: Primary textual or astronomical source
source_levels.use_case: Canonical calculation basis, established jyotisha/Panchang text, recognised astronomical source.

source_levels.label: Traditional commentary or regional authority
source_levels.use_case: Regional Panchang authority, observance rule family, temple/tradition-specific practice note.

source_levels.label: Modern scholarly or technical source
source_levels.use_case: Academic or technical Panchang calculation/history reference.

source_levels.label: Drishvara editorial curation
source_levels.use_case: Simplified public-facing explanation only; cannot invent authority.

source_record_schema.source_type: textual | astronomical | regional_panchang | temple_tradition | scholarly | editorial
